summary: An FBI electronic communication documents an interview with a redacted witness who described repeated sightings of lights near their property since 2021, including an initial 2021 sighting where a single light split into two or three lights forming a triangular pattern, plus a separate 1996 incident of a large light stopping a vehicle in New Mexico. The witness described cross-referencing sightings with ADS-B flight data to rule out aircraft and stated activity increased since September.
